sample-page.title: Sample Scalable Page
sample-page.metaDesc: This is a sample entry showing how future pages can be served from content data instead of new controller methods.
sample-page.heroSubtitle: Add more entries to this file and the site can render them without touching the controller layer.
sample-page.body:
Use this pattern to grow from a small brochure site into a larger content-driven website without duplicating controller logic.

For a large rollout, this JSON can later be replaced by a database or CMS source.
